favorite products hope inspire experimentation with areas cooking entertaining your home.

recipients 2013 Artadia Angeles Awards $15,000 level are: Cayetano Ferrer Nicole Miller.
three recipients $3,000 awards are: Vishal Jugdeo, Stanya Kahn Kerry Tribe.

Valentino Clemente Ludovico Garavani best known Valentino, Italian fashion designer born 1932 founder Valentino brand company.

became interested fashion while primary school moved Paris pursue this interest.
studied École Beaux-Arts Chambre Syndicale Couture Parisienne.
first choice apprenticeship, Paris, Jacques Fath, then Balenciaga.
then joined Laroche years.
1960 Valentino left Paris opened fashion house Rome posh Condotti with backing father.
Valentino became known dresses, bright shade that became known fashion industry "Valentino red".
became well know even 1960 1964 Mrs. Kennedy ordered Valentino haute couture dresses, black white, wore them during year mourning following President John Kennedy's assassination.
From then devoted client would become friend.
